name: Limey Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
Crust
1. Mix 1 cup graham cracker crumbs with melted butter.
2. Press mixture into bottom and up sides of a 9-inch springform pan.
3. Bake at 350°F for 10 minutes; let cool.
Filling
4. In large bowl, beat egg yolks and honey until pale yellow.
5. Gradually add lime juice and sweetened condensed milk, whisking constantly.
6. Stir in cream cheese until smooth.
7. Fold in whipped cream.
8. Divide mixture between crust and up sides of pan.
9. Decorate with green food coloring (if desired).
10. Chill 4 hours or overnight before serving.
